summary: Tested three P0 implementations: CRM Quote Builder Drawer, Dashboard Empty States, and Document Tables Standardization. Quote Builder Drawer opens correctly from lead detail drawer with Add Product/Service buttons and item type lock-in. Backend API for creating quotes from leads works correctly. Dashboard pages show data when available. Document tables have standardized columns in code but UI rendering varies.

ui_bugs.issue: List view shows different columns (DATE, NUMBER, CUSTOMER, TYPE, AMOUNT, STATUS, SALES) instead of standardized (Document #, Client, Date, Amount, Status, Actions). Code has correct columns but UI renders differently.
Page shows blank/empty even though API returns data. The table with standardized columns exists in code but not rendering.
Page shows completely blank instead of empty state message. Empty state code exists (lines 117-121) but not rendering.
Product search returns 0 results in UI even though API returns products. Search for 'cotton' returns products via curl but not in UI.

action_items: Investigate why QuotesPage list view shows different columns than the standardized ones in code
Fix PurchaseOrdersPage rendering - API returns data but page shows blank
Fix DormantClientAlertsPage rendering - page shows blank instead of empty state
Debug QuoteBuilderDrawer product search - API works but UI shows 0 results
critical_code_review_comments: QuotesPage has standardized columns in code (lines 440-445) but screenshot shows different columns - possible view mode issue or data mapping issue
PurchaseOrdersPage has correct table structure with standardized columns (lines 275-280) but page renders blank
DormantClientAlertsPage has empty state implemented (lines 117-121) but page shows blank - possible API error or loading state issue
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three P0 features tested: 1) CRM Quote Builder Drawer - opens correctly, has Add Product/Service buttons, item type lock-in logic exists in code, backend API works (tested via curl). Product search in UI returns 0 results even though API works. 2) Dashboard Empty States - pages have empty state code but some pages render blank. 3) Document Tables - DeliveryNotesPage has correct standardized columns, QuotesPage and PurchaseOrdersPage have issues with rendering.
verified_working: CRM Quote Builder Drawer opens from lead detail drawer via 'Create Quote' button
Quote Builder has Add Product and Add Service buttons with data-testid
DeliveryNotesPage has standardized table columns (Document #, Client, Date, Amount, Status, Actions)
Item Type Lock-in logic exists in QuoteBuilderDrawer code (lockedType variable, disabled buttons)
Negotiated cost toggle and input exist in code with proper data-testid attributes
needs_investigation: QuoteBuilderDrawer product search returns 0 results in UI but API works
PurchaseOrdersPage renders blank despite API returning data
DormantClientAlertsPage renders blank instead of empty state
QuotesPage list view columns don't match standardized format
